use_cases: Image gallery with immersive 3D card transitions for portfolio or media sites
Product showcase carousel with hover-to-reveal card details
Feature highlight section with scroll-driven 3D depth animation
Creative portfolio with interactive 3D card stacking effect
Team member showcase with perspective-based card rotations
ai_summary: A 3D sliding card carousel component featuring perspective transforms (rotateX, rotateY, rotateZ), scroll-triggered vertical animation, and hover interactions that expand individual cards. The component applies CSS 3D transforms with a -25deg Y rotation and -120deg Z rotation to create an immersive card stacking effect. Ideal for showcasing images, products, or content with depth and visual intrigue.
